Name: MOD-Home-HomeDashboard-Functional: Verify all expected left sidebar navigation items are visible for System Admin
Precondition: User is logged in as System Admin ([MODERNIZED_SYSTEM_ADMIN_USEREMAIL]) and is on the Home page.
Objective: To verify the left sidebar displays all expected navigation items including 'Site Settings' for System Admin.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Login page is displayed.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated.
Password is entered as masked dots.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the Home page at /home/index.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Back to Platform' link is visible in the left sidebar
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Back to Platform" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Back to Platform' link is visible at the top of the left sidebar.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Home' link is visible in the left sidebar
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Home' link is visible and shown as the currently active page in the sidebar.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Workrooms' link is visible in the left sidebar
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Workrooms' link is visible in the sidebar.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Library' link is visible in the left sidebar
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Library' link is visible in the sidebar.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Directory' link is visible in the left sidebar
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Directory' link is visible in the sidebar.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Messaging' link is visible in the left sidebar
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Messaging' link is visible in the sidebar.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Minutes' link is visible in the left sidebar
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Link to minutes" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Minutes' link is visible in the sidebar.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="3 Approvals" | value: none
